name: skill-architect-makeinto
description: Converts an existing file or code repository into a Claude Code skill.

input_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the source file or directory to convert into a skill.

mode.description: Scope mode. 'auto' detects automatically. 'single' forces one skill. 'multi' forces skill tree.

skill_name.description: Optional override for the inferred skill name. Must be lowercase with hyphens only.

output_dir.description: Optional override for the output root directory. Defaults to ~/.claude/skills/
